title: montolivaea attenuata
side_effects: Montolivaea attenuata can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's compounds can also lead to kidney damage and liver strain. Additionally, improper use of Montolivaea attenuata may cause skin irritation, itching, and rashes, which can range from mild to severe. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can result in stomach ulcers and gastrointestinal problems.
